title: Saved Workspace · e2e-fix
description: Single-user MVP workspace for fixing end-to-end issues inside a named workspace shell.

nodes.status: Mock web app · replace URL when ready

nodes.title: ChatGPT
nodes.status: Mock web app · replace URL when ready

nodes.title: Codex Terminal
help: If you want a different shell, change the command behind ttyd.

nodes.title: Docker Ubuntu Terminal
help: Start with: ttyd -W -p 7682 docker run --rm -it ubuntu:22.04 bash
For Finder integration, prefer a named mounted container like e2e-fix-ubuntu.
Replace ubuntu:22.04 with your real task container when ready.

sections.title: Current scope
items: WorkAdventure is only the space shell and entry point.
The real task workspace is the embedded docking web app.
This MVP stays single-user, local-only, with no Room API sync.

sections.title: Node handoff
items: GitHub and ChatGPT are configurable web apps.
Both terminal apps expect ttyd to be started locally.
Layout changes are saved in localStorage for this named workspace.

sections.title: Next replacement step
items: Swap mock URLs for your real internal pages or iframe-safe proxies.
Point ttyd at the real Codex shell and Docker task container.
Replace this static summary with your real review/update feed.

nodes.title: Finder
nodes.status: Unified file browser · host workspace + running Docker containers
help: Start the file service with: cd workspace-app && npm run files
Finder reads the host workspace root and auto-detects running Docker containers.
If you want Ubuntu folders to appear, run a named Ubuntu container first.
